name: 戏楼
description: 显园内的主要建筑，二层结构。一层是舞台和后台，二层有平台和围幔。舞台高约2米，东西两侧有窗户，西侧有摇杆控制背景布升降。

visual.prompt: 1914 Republican era Chinese opera theater, two-story traditional building, stage with silk curtains, oil painting style, warm lighting

name: 舞台
description: 戏楼一层的表演区域，高约2米，铺着地毯。西侧有梯子通向二层平台，东侧是演员上下场通道。

visual.prompt: 1914 Chinese opera stage, wooden platform with carpet, silk curtains, oil painting style, dramatic stage lighting

name: 戏楼二层
description: 戏楼二层平台，有围幔遮挡。常晚亭的尸体在此被发现，吊在围幔后面。东西两侧有窗户。

visual.prompt: 1914 Chinese opera theater second floor, wooden platform with silk curtains, dim lighting, oil painting style, mysterious atmosphere

name: 东北院
description: 显园东北角的院落，花彩班成员居住于此。有化妆区、住处等。

visual.prompt: 1914 Republican era Chinese garden courtyard, traditional architecture, oil painting style, warm afternoon light

name: 东南院
description: 显园东南角的院落，白延秋一行（韩家）居住于此。

visual.prompt: 1914 Republican era Chinese garden courtyard, traditional architecture, oil painting style, warm afternoon light

name: 西南院
description: 显园西南角的院落，曾是白延秋被关押的地方，后来他的尸骨被埋在此处。院门被锁。

visual.prompt: 1914 abandoned Chinese garden courtyard, overgrown with weeds, oil painting style, somber atmosphere

name: 显园
description: 田广顷的园林，因万玉蓉赞助而重新开放。园内有戏楼、多个院落、池塘等。是故事的主要发生地。

visual.prompt: 1914 Republican era Chinese garden, traditional architecture, pond, willow trees, oil painting style, warm lighting

name: 后台
description: 戏楼一层舞台后面的空间，有化妆区、道具区、梯子通向二层。

visual.prompt: 1914 Chinese opera backstage, costumes, props, dim lighting, oil painting style
